name: James Earl Jones' Glazed Ostrich Tenderloin
recipeIngredient: 6 cups Chicken stock, reduced to demi glace
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate ostrich in soy sauce mixed with garlic, ginger, pepper, and oil for up to 2 hours.
2. On a very hot grill with lid down, sear ostrich for 2 minutes on each side. Ostrich will be almost cooked.
3. Remove and cool the ostrich. Slice into 1/4-inch medallions.
4. Heat 2 tablespoons garlic oil in a heavy non-stick saute pan over medium-high heat until hot.
5. Arrange half of the medallions in the pan and immediately turn them, starting with the first one placed. When all are turned, pour half of the demi-glace over the pan and remove ostrich to platter, cover loosely, and place in warm oven.
6. Repeat with the remaining medallions.
7. Serve immediately.
